metadata.title: Toolaze - AI Image & Video Creation Tools Online
metadata.description: Create, edit, compress, and convert images with AI tools, one-time credits, and clear usage policies.

home.heroTitle: All-in-One AI Image & Video Creation Platform
home.heroTagline: Create AI images and videos with leading AI models. Try selected features for free and purchase credits when you need more generations.
home.title: AI Image Generator & AI Video Generator Online.
home.subtitle: Create AI images and videos with supported third-party models. Selected tools are free to try; continued AI generation uses credits.
home.aiVideoIntro: Turn ideas into engaging videos in minutes with AI. Powered by advanced AI models, Toolaze's AI Video Generator helps you create eye-catching videos from text-to-video and image-to-video. No skills required!
home.aiImageIntro: Generate high-quality images instantly with AI. From artistic illustrations to realistic visuals, Toolaze's AI Image Generator transforms your ideas with text-to-image and image-to-image — fast, flexible, and effortless.
home.trendingTitle: Trending AI Image & Video Models, All in One Place
home.trendingSubtitle: Access Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Nano Banana Pro, and Nano Banana 2 without switching platforms.

seedance-2.summary: AI video generator for text-to-video and image-to-video. Blend prompts with reference images, short clips, and audio; credit use depends on model settings.

kling-3.summary: AI video generator with native 4K and 2K output, plus cinematic multi-shot controls. Try supported workflows and use credits for continued generation.

nano-banana-pro.summary: AI image generator for text-to-image and detailed edits: product shots, portraits, and campaign visuals with strong prompt fidelity. Free to try on Toolaze.

nano-banana-2.summary: Fast AI image generator for everyday text-to-image and quick variants—ideal for social posts, concepts, and iterative creative tests without a heavy pipeline.

gpt-image-2.summary: Text-to-image AI built for clean compositions and legible in-image text. Selected generations are free to try; continued use may require credits.

watermark-remover.summary: AI watermark remover for images you own or are authorized to edit: clean overlays, date stamps, and watermarks with clear usage policies.

photo-restoration.summary: AI photo restoration for faded, scratched, or blurry pictures. Try selected restoration workflows and review credit requirements before generation.

ai-couple-photo-maker.summary: AI couple photo maker: turn one or two portraits into romantic or cinematic duo scenes with curated templates—share-ready images without a studio shoot.

world-cup-ai-image-generator.summary: Generate football posters, fan edits, sticker packs, and watch-party visuals with GPT Image 2. Start with a reusable template or selfie, then download a share-ready still image.

wan-2-7-image.summary: AI image generator for complex prompts, multi-reference inputs, prompt-based edits, readable text layouts, and 2K to 4K creative workflows on Toolaze.

ai-dance-generator.summary: Upload one image and create a short dance video for choreography ideas, class promos, and social clips. Choose duration and aspect settings in the generator.

home.aiToolsHubTitle: AI Tools for Images, Video & Everyday Media Workflows
home.aiToolsHubSubtitle: One hub for AI image generation, AI video generation, selected free utilities, and credit-based creative workflows.
home.aiToolsHubIntro: Discover AI tools built for creators and marketers who need reliable output without juggling multiple sites. Combine flagship image and video models with practical helpers for compression, conversion, restoration, and typography, with credit requirements shown before generation.

aiToolsHubItems.title: AI image generators
aiToolsHubItems.description: Ship campaign-ready visuals with text-to-image and image-to-image. GPT Image 2, Nano Banana Pro, and Nano Banana 2 deliver sharp detail, flexible aspect ratios, and resolutions up to 4K for ads, social posts, and concept art.

aiToolsHubItems.title: AI video generators
aiToolsHubItems.description: Turn scripts, reference frames, or a single uploaded image into short video concepts. AI Dance Generator adds quick dance clips for class promos and social posts, while the video model pages support cinematic promos, storyboards, and short-form storytelling.

aiToolsHubItems.title: Browser media utilities
aiToolsHubItems.description: Round out your workflow with lossy image compression, format conversion, stylized font previews, and emoji copy-and-paste—lightweight, non-generative utilities that stay easy to use online.

home.advancedToolsSubtitle: Portrait tools, authorized watermark cleanup, and AI photo restoration. Selected workflows are free to try; continued AI generation may require credits.
home.utilityToolsTitle: Free Browser Tools for Images & Text
home.utilityToolsSubtitle: Image compression, format conversion, stylized font previews, and emoji copy-and-paste—fast utilities online without generative AI.
home.sectionAiImageSubtitle: AI image generation online with text-to-image and image-to-image workflows. Try selected tools for free, then use credits for continued generation depending on model and settings.
home.sectionAiVideoSubtitle: Create AI videos from prompts, reference frames, or one uploaded image. Explore AI Dance Generator for short social dance clips alongside video tools for promos, storyboards, and cinematic scenes.
home.sectionToolsSubtitle: Image compression, format conversion, font generator—free and available online.

seoIntro.title: AI Image Generator & AI Video Generator Online
seoIntro.paragraph1: Toolaze brings AI image generation, AI video generation, and practical media utilities into one platform. Try selected features for free, then purchase credits when you need more generations or supported premium model workflows.
seoIntro.paragraph2: Use text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, and image-to-video workflows with supported third-party AI models. Credit requirements may vary by selected model, quality settings, duration, and account status.
seoIntro.paragraph3: Browser-based utilities such as image compression, format conversion, font generation, and emoji copy-and-paste may be available for free. AI generation features use credits when shown in the generation flow.

home.toolFormatConverterDesc: HEIC to JPG, PNG to WEBP.
home.toolFontGeneratorDesc: Generate custom fonts online for free. Create cursive, fancy, bold, italic, gothic, and tattoo fonts. Copy and paste instantly. No sign-up required.
home.toolEmojiCopyAndPasteDesc: Copy and paste emojis online for free. Browse by category, search, pick skin tone, and copy with one click. No sign-up required.

whyToolaze.title: Built for Creators & Performance
whyToolaze.subtitle: Everything you need to know about why Toolaze is the smart choice for AI image generation, AI video generation, and creative workflows.

items.q: What is an AI image generator?
items.a: An AI image generator creates images from text prompts or reference images. Toolaze lets you try selected image workflows for free, while continued generation may require credits depending on model and settings.

items.q: What is an AI video generator?
items.a: An AI video generator creates videos from text, images, or other media. Toolaze supports text-to-video and image-to-video workflows through third-party AI models, with credit requirements shown before generation.

Browser-based utility tools may be available for free. AI image and video generation features may require credits depending on the selected model and generation settings. The required credit amount is displayed before generation.
No. Toolaze credits are one-time purchases. Purchased credits are valid for 12 months, and failed generations return credits when our system confirms no usable output was delivered.

items.q: Can I use AI image generator online without signing up?
items.a: Some selected tools may be available to try before signing in. Account access may be required for credit purchases, generation history, higher limits, or continued AI generation.

home.toolWatermarkRemoverDesc: Remove unwanted overlays, date stamps, or watermarks only from images you own or are authorized to edit.
home.toolPhotoRestorationDesc: Restore old, blurry, or scratched photos in seconds. Recover clearer faces and details with one-click AI repair. No sign-up required.

freeGeneration.title: Free to Try AI Image & Video Creation
freeGeneration.desc: Try selected AI image and video workflows online. Continued generation, premium models, or higher settings may require credits.

noLimits.title: Clear Credit-Based Usage
noLimits.desc: Credit requirements are shown before generation. Purchase credits when you need more image or video generations.

proOutput.title: 4K Output & Multimodal Inputs
proOutput.desc: AI image models support up to 4K resolution. AI video models accept text, images, video, and audio. Pro-quality output with fast generation—production-ready for creators.

instantUse.title: Start With Clear Limits
instantUse.desc: Explore selected tools online, review the required credits, and sign in when you need account history, purchases, or continued generation.

footer.tagline: AI generation tools • One-time credits • Clear usage policies

metadata.title: About Us - Toolaze
metadata.description: Learn about Toolaze, an AI image and creative tools platform with one-time credits and clear usage policies.

about.title: We Handle the Tool. You Handle the Laze.
about.subtitle: Productivity isn't about working harder. It's about being smart enough to let AI do the heavy lifting.

whyToolaze.title: Why "Toolaze"?
whyToolaze.content1: The name comes from a simple philosophy: Tool + Laze.
whyToolaze.content2: We believe that as a creator, your energy is finite. Every minute you spend resizing images, converting formats, or worrying about unclear processing rules is a minute stolen from your creativity.
whyToolaze.content3: We built Toolaze to be the ultimate "lazy" solution. We use practical AI workflows to automate the boring technical stuff, from generation to editing to file cleanup.
whyToolaze.content4: So go ahead, be a little lazy. We've got the tools covered.

privacy.title: Laze on Policy
privacy.desc: Use clear privacy, refund, and acceptable-use rules before you spend credits or generate assets.

waiting.title: Laze on Waiting
waiting.desc: Skip repetitive setup. Toolaze keeps AI generation, editing, and file cleanup moving in one workspace.

cost.title: Laze on Cost
cost.desc: Buy credits once and use them across supported tools. Failed generations return credits when the failure is confirmed.

cta.title: Ready to work less?
cta.subtitle: Try our tools and reclaim your creative time.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy - Toolaze
metadata.description: Toolaze Privacy Policy for AI generation, uploads, credits, payments, analytics, and third-party providers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Toolaze provides AI generation and creative tools. This policy explains how we handle prompts, uploads, generated outputs, credits, payments, analytics, and support records.

section1.title: 1. AI generation and uploaded content
section1.content: Toolaze may process the information needed to provide the selected tool or generation.
points: AI generation may send prompts, uploaded images, uploaded videos, reference files, and generated outputs to third-party AI providers.
Creem or another payment processor may handle checkout, receipts, taxes, and refunds.
We may store content and metadata for history, downloads, abuse prevention, billing, debugging, refunds, and support.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: We collect account, usage, payment, and technical information needed to run Toolaze.

logFiles.title: A. Logs and usage records
logFiles.content: Logs may include IP address, browser type, device information, generation status, credit balance changes, timestamps, and error details.

cookies.title: B. Cookies and analytics
cookies.content: Toolaze uses cookies and analytics for authentication, preferences, checkout flows, security, reliability, and product measurement.

section3.title: 3. AI providers and vendors
section3.content: We may share prompts, uploaded images, generated outputs, account events, and payment metadata with AI providers, hosting, storage, CDN, analytics, moderation, authentication, email, and payment vendors.

section4.title: 4. Your rights
section4.content: Depending on your location, you may ask to access, correct, delete, or export certain personal information. Some records may be kept for security, tax, accounting, legal, or fraud prevention reasons.

section5.title: 5. Contact us
section5.content: Questions about this Privacy Policy can be sent to support@toolaze.com.

metadata.title: Terms of Service - Toolaze
metadata.description: Toolaze Terms of Service for AI generation, credits, one-time purchases, commercial use, refunds, and acceptable use.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Toolaze. By using Toolaze, you agree to these Terms, the Privacy Policy, the Refund Policy, and the Acceptable Use Policy.

section1.title: 1. Service description
section1.content: Toolaze provides AI generation, AI editing, image utilities, video utilities, prompt workflows, generation history, and credit-based purchases. Toolaze is an independent AI creative platform that provides a custom interface for supported third-party AI model workflows.
section1.localProcessing: AI generation: Some tools use third-party model providers and cloud infrastructure to process prompts, uploaded media, and generated outputs.

section2.title: 2. Use of service
section2.license: License: You may use Toolaze for personal or commercial purposes if you follow these Terms.
section2.noRegistration: Credits: Purchased credits are one-time purchases, valid for 12 months, and returned when a failed generation is confirmed.
section2.prohibitedActs: Acceptable Use: You agree not to:
prohibitedList: Reverse engineer, decompile, scrape, overload, or interfere with the service.
Use the service to create illegal, NSFW, sexual, hateful, deceptive, or infringing content.
Use automated systems that harm availability, security, payment flows, or safety systems.

section3.title: 3. User content and commercial use
section3.ownership: Your Ownership: You keep the rights you already have in prompts, uploads, reference files, and generated outputs.
section3.noLiability: Commercial Use: Commercial use is allowed for generated outputs, subject to these Terms, the Acceptable Use Policy, applicable law, and any third-party model provider rules.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual property
section4.content: Toolaze, including its website, software, design, branding, logos, and service features, belongs to Toolaze and its licensors. Product names, trademarks, and model names belong to their respective owners and identify supported third-party AI model workflows available through Toolaze. Toolaze is not affiliated with or endorsed by model creators unless a page explicitly says otherwise.

section5.title: 5. AI output limits
section5.content: AI outputs can be inaccurate, unexpected, delayed, unavailable, similar to outputs generated for other users, or blocked by safety systems.
section5.guarantee: We do not guarantee that a third-party model will produce a specific result, quality level, style, file type, or delivery time.

section6.title: 6. Limitation of liability
section6.content: To the fullest extent allowed by law, Toolaze is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, punitive, or lost-profit damages arising from use of the service.

section7.title: 7. Refunds and changes
section7.content: Refunds are available for unused credits under the Refund Policy. We may update these Terms from time to time, and continued use means you accept the updated Terms.

section8.title: 8. Contact us
section8.content: Questions about these Terms can be sent to support@toolaze.com
